mapPicker.title: Select location
mapPicker.clickToSelect: Click on the map to select location
mapPicker.locationBlocked: Location permission blocked. Select a point manually or enable location.
mapPicker.mapLoadError: Could not load maps. Check your connection or blockers (DNS/AdBlock).
mapPicker.enableLocationIntro: Your browser has blocked geolocation after several rejections. Follow the steps for your platform and then reload:
mapPicker.chromeDesktop: Chrome (Desktop): Click on the settings icon (lock/tune) to the left of the URL → Site permissions → Location → Allow. Reload.
mapPicker.chromeAndroid: Chrome (Android): Lock/tune icon → Permissions → Location → Change to Allow. If still blocked, go to Settings → Apps → Chrome → Permissions → Location. Reload.
mapPicker.edge: Edge: Lock icon → Site permissions → Location → Allow. Reload.
mapPicker.safariIos: Safari (iOS): System Settings → Safari → Location → Ask or Allow. Then open the page and accept the prompt.
mapPicker.firefox: Firefox: Lock icon → Permissions → Location → Allow.
mapPicker.chromeReset: Chrome general reset: chrome://settings/content/location → Clear blocks and add your domain to "Allowed".
mapPicker.afterEnabling: After enabling permission you can use "Use my location" or reload to center the map automatically.

REVIEW_FLAGGED.title: Review reported
REVIEW_FLAGGED.message: Your review has been reported and is being reviewed.

REVIEW_REQUEST.title: Rate your experience! ⭐
REVIEW_REQUEST.message: Your service has been completed. Let us know how your experience was.

BOOKING_STATUS_UPDATE.title: Contract update
BOOKING_STATUS_UPDATE.message: {{providerName}} has updated the status of your contract to: {{status}}
BOOKING_STATUS_UPDATE.messageDefault: The status of your contract has been updated.

PAYMENT_REQUIRED.title: Payment pending 💳
PAYMENT_REQUIRED.message: Payment is required for your contract.

REQUEST_UPDATED.title: Request updated 📝
REQUEST_UPDATED.message: {{clientName}} has updated the details of the request "{{requestTitle}}". Review the changes.
REQUEST_UPDATED.messageDefault: A client has updated a service request. Review the new details.

SUBSCRIPTION_ACTIVATED.title: Subscription activated! 🎉
SUBSCRIPTION_ACTIVATED.message: Your {{planName}} plan has been activated successfully. Enjoy all its benefits!

SUBSCRIPTION_DOWNGRADED.title: Plan updated
SUBSCRIPTION_DOWNGRADED.message: Your subscription has been canceled. You are now on the free Basic plan.

REFERRAL_BONUS.title: 🎉 Someone used your referral code!
REFERRAL_BONUS.message: {{newUserName}} signed up with your code. You earned {{daysAwarded}} days of Expert Plan! Total accumulated: {{totalDays}} days.
REFERRAL_BONUS.messageMax: {{newUserName}} signed up with your code. You've already reached the maximum bonus days.

REFERRAL_BONUS_EXPIRED.title: Your referral bonus has expired
REFERRAL_BONUS_EXPIRED.message: Your Expert Plan period from referrals has ended. Subscribe to keep the benefits!
